title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.674 - Lawrence A. Witt National Guard Armory designated in Lawrence County
text:
41.674.  Lawrence A. Witt National Guard Armory designated in Lawrence County. — The active National Guard armory located in or nearest to Pierce City, Lawrence County, shall be designated as the "Lawrence A. Witt" National Guard armory.
(L. 2005 H.B. 236)
